text:
Created attachment 244665
0001-games-suyimazu-Update-to-2023.09.patch

Hello,

this is an update to 2023.09

ChangeLog:

This is an maintenance release.

    - Changed runtime dependency to wine7 until full functionality of wine have been available again.
    
    - Fixed bad usage of cat and grep.
    
    - An proper notification will be now given if an application have been closed.
